name: Rogz Alpinist Classic Harness Medium Chocolate Patterned (Sj23-J)
shortDescription: Rogz Alpinist Classic Harnesses have a front chest lead attachment so you can walk your dog using any one of our Multi leads for the added benefit of Stop-Pull steering control.
description: Rogz Alpinist Classic Harness: Made with soft to the touch webbing, Rogz Alpinist Classic Harnesses have a front chest lead attachment so you can walk your dog using any one of our Multi leads for the added benefit of Stop-Pull steering control. Fully adjustable and durable, these harnesses are designed to function with our Car-safe Seat Belt Clips and worn beneath our dog jackets with lead attachment openings. Fully adjustable and durable. They are designed to function with our Car-safe Seat Belt Clips and worn beneath our dog jackets with lead attachment openings.
